title: Claw Calendar
description: AI-assisted calendar web app — create, update, and delete events using natural language commands.
fullDescription: Developed an AI-assisted calendar web application using Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, and FullCalendar for interactive schedule management. Built RESTful event management APIs (CRUD) with Prisma and PostgreSQL, including date-range filtering and validation. Implemented a streaming AI chat workflow via OpenAI SDK with Ollama backend, enabling automatic CREATE, UPDATE, and DELETE event actions from natural-language commands.
features: Interactive calendar UI with FullCalendar
RESTful CRUD API for event management
Streaming AI chat with natural language commands
Auto CREATE / UPDATE / DELETE events via AI
Date-range filtering and input validation
Ollama local LLM backend support

title: AI Interview Training System
description: Multimodal AI system for interactive interview training — facial expression analysis and adaptive question generation.
fullDescription: A research collaboration with a lecturer at PT Sentra Vidya Utama (SEVIMA). Handled video/image data to detect facial liveness, track expressions, and analyze engagement in real time. Contributed to orchestrating multiple data streams (video, audio, text) and built an adaptive module that generates interview questions tailored to individual user profiles.
features: Facial liveness detection and expression tracking
Real-time engagement analysis from video
Multi-stream orchestration (video, audio, text)
Adaptive interview question generation per user profile
Research collaboration with PT Sentra Vidya Utama

title: Anime Face Generator
description: Deep Convolutional GAN using PyTorch to generate realistic 128×128 anime face images, evaluated with FID score.
fullDescription: Developed a Deep Convolutional GAN (DCGAN) using PyTorch to generate realistic 128×128 anime face images. Designed a Generator with transposed convolutions and a Discriminator with spectral normalization for stable training. Implemented a training pipeline with BCE loss, data augmentation, and TensorBoard logging for 30 epochs. Evaluated generated image quality using the FID (Fréchet Inception Distance) metric on the Kaggle anime faces dataset.
features: Deep Convolutional GAN (DCGAN) architecture
Generator with transposed convolutions
Discriminator with spectral normalization for training stability
BCE loss + data augmentation pipeline
TensorBoard logging for 30 epochs
FID metric evaluation on Kaggle anime faces dataset

title: Job Recommendation System
description: ML-based job recommendation engine using RuleFit with Random Forest on 9,000+ records.
fullDescription: Developed an ML-based job recommendation system using the RuleFit algorithm combining Random Forest and L1 Logistic Regression. Preprocessed a dataset of 9,000+ records with a 74.67% retention rate through deduplication and outlier removal. Built a complete training pipeline with scikit-learn including model evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, and performance metrics tracking. Created Jupyter notebooks for data normalization, model training, and deployment with joblib serialization.
features: RuleFit with Random Forest + L1 Logistic Regression
Preprocessed 9,000+ records (74.67% retention)
Deduplication and outlier removal pipeline
Hyperparameter tuning and cross-validation
Jupyter notebooks for full end-to-end flow
joblib serialization for deployment

title: Menya 麺屋
description: Japanese restaurant website with Gemini AI chatbot for menu recommendations and full e-commerce features.
fullDescription: Developed a Japanese restaurant website with Laravel featuring complete e-commerce functionality. Created an AI chatbot assistant using Google Gemini API for menu recommendations and order customization. Built full e-commerce features including user authentication, menu browsing, shopping cart, and checkout system. Designed a responsive Japanese-themed UI with Tailwind CSS and Livewire for real-time interactions.
features: AI chatbot with Google Gemini API for recommendations
Full e-commerce: cart, checkout, authentication
Livewire for real-time UI interactions
Japanese-themed responsive design with Tailwind CSS
Menu browsing and order customization

title: Multiplayer Chess Game
description: Online multiplayer chess with real-time gameplay, full chess engine, and automated email notifications via SMTP.
fullDescription: Developed an online multiplayer chess game with real-time gameplay using Python socket programming. Implemented a complete chess engine with move validation, check/checkmate detection, and special moves including castling and en passant. Built an interactive GUI using Pygame featuring a visual board, piece animations, and a 10-minute per-game timer. Integrated an automated email notification system using SMTP to inform players of game results.
features: Real-time multiplayer via Python sockets
Full chess engine with move validation
Check / checkmate detection
Special moves: castling and en passant
Pygame GUI with piece animations
10-minute game timer
Automated SMTP email result notifications

title: Tangga
description: Concentration game inspired by 'I'm on Observation Duty' — find objects that change over time across multiple rooms.
fullDescription: Tangga is a concentration game that trains players' focus and observation skills, inspired by 'I'm on Observation Duty'. Players must find objects that subtly change as the game progresses across multiple rooms. All game elements — including the game logic and visual assets — were designed and built from scratch by me and my partner.
features: Concentration gameplay inspired by 'I'm on Observation Duty'
Multiple rooms: Gaming Room, Living Room, Bathroom, Bedroom
Objects that subtly change over time
Custom-made game assets designed from scratch
Built as a collaborative project with a partner

title: CLIP Face Anti-Spoofing
description: Fine-tuned CLIP ViT-L/14 for 6-class face anti-spoofing with multi-level features, progressive training, and ensemble inference — achieving F1=0.9946.
fullDescription: Fine-tuned OpenAI's CLIP ViT-L/14@336px backbone for a 6-class face anti-spoofing task on a Kaggle competition dataset. Designed a Globally Aware Connector (GAC) that fuses multi-level patch features (early, mid, deep layers) via cross-attention before classification. Implemented a progressive training strategy: frozen backbone → partial unfreeze → full fine-tune with cosine LR scheduling. Applied aggressive augmentation (RandAugment, MixUp, color jitter, elastic distortion) and used ArcFace + cross-entropy loss with label smoothing. Achieved ensemble inference with Test-Time Augmentation (TTA) across five independently trained folds, reaching a final F1 score of 0.9946.
features: CLIP ViT-L/14@336px backbone with frozen-to-fine-tune progressive training
Globally Aware Connector (GAC) fusing early, mid, and deep patch features via cross-attention
6-class face anti-spoofing: live vs. 5 spoof attack types
ArcFace + cross-entropy loss with label smoothing
Aggressive augmentation: RandAugment, MixUp, elastic distortion, color jitter
5-fold ensemble with Test-Time Augmentation (TTA)
Final F1 score: 0.9946 on Kaggle competition

title: Todolist App
description: Full-stack todo application built with NestJS and TypeScript using modular architecture and RESTful API.
fullDescription: Built a full-stack todo list application using NestJS framework with TypeScript. Implemented a RESTful API with dependency injection and modular architecture following NestJS best practices. Integrated database ORM for task persistence and CRUD operations. Developed a responsive UI with CSS styling for optimal user experience.
features: RESTful API with NestJS and TypeScript
Dependency injection and modular architecture
Database ORM for task persistence
Full CRUD operations
Responsive CSS UI
